ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the application */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the application is deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "last_deployed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last deployed the application */,
  "last_deployed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application file */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., zip, tar, jar) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file is an override file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_files_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the parameter belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the parameter is mandatory */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., PathVariable, RequestParam) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "allowed_values" TEXT /* JSON array of allowed values for the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for numeric parameters */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for numeric parameters */,
  "regex_pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for string parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_parameters_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorization_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorization group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the authorization group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the authorization group */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions assigned to the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_authorization" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorization */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authorization group */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of specific permissions for the application within the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the authorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authorization was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the authorization */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authorization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_authorization_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_authorization_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES authorization_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_overrides" (
  "override_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override file */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the override file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the override file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the override file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the override file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the override file was uploaded */,
  "override_type" TEXT /* Type of override (e.g., environment-specific, user-specific) */,
  "applied_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the override */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the override was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_overrides_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment log */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the application */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the deployment status */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the deployment occurred */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application that was deployed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., deployment, rollback, update) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authorization" (
  "user_auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user authorization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authorization group */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of specific permissions for the user within the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the authorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authorization was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the authorization */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the authorization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_authorization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_authorization_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES authorization_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session started */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)
